title: Add ESXi host in mRemoteNG
author: m0hossa
body_snippet: Iam trying to add ESXi hosts in mRemoteNG but it does support to connect to the ESXi host on web. Is there a way to add ESXi host in nRemoteNG?

iterations.description: Issue body is empty and only contains stale triage refresh comments with no reproducible steps, expected vs actual behavior, or description of what ESXi host support entails.
Repass confirmed: ESXi uses HTTPS web UI — already works via existing HTTP/S protocol type

comments.author: aeversden
comments.snippet: I too have tried this of recent and stumbled upon the same question being asked here. Anyone been able to achieve this and how please?

comments.author: simonai1254
comments.snippet:
What Version of mRemoteNG are you using? 
I think it should work with 1.77.2-nb once you get the WebView2 up and running (you may want to consult #2256 and linked)
